jobs.title: Account Manager II
jobs.description:
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.

We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.

About the Team
Careem Express is a vertical within the Careem ecosystem – a startup within a startup. We are responsible for fulfillment and last mile delivery for hundreds of merchants in a variety of industries, including e-commerce, food, grocery, and other areas. We are a small and passionate team that is building the next big vertical for Careem.senior-commercial-lead is at the core of Careem Express. They are our face to clients, and we rely on them to build a strong relationship with enterprises and important clients & build on our strong pipeline targeting non-food clients. They are responsible for growing existing Tier 1 clients and bringing in demand in a sustainable way.
What You’ll Do
  • Business development - Acquire new accounts across UAE (prospecting, targeting, pitching, contract negotiations, go-live)
  • Build and manage relationships with existing tier 1 clients
  • Achieve monthly Revenue targets through existing and new B2B clients
  • Commercial understanding and handling negotiations with clients
  • Coordinate with operations / logistics team internally for support to make sure that the pitches are made at the right commercials
  • Coordinate with Legal internally for contract closures
What You’ll Need
  • 2-3 years of Account Management/Sales experience from non food B2B, Ecommerce or on-demand logistics industry
  • High performer – track record of generating revenue for businesses
  • Business development mindset coupled with Operational d …

jobs.title: Land surveyor
jobs.description: Job Summary We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Land Surveyor to join our team in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. As a Land Surveyor, you will play a crucial role in our infrastructure projects, ensuring precise measurements and alignments for various construction activities. Review and understand project contract documents, drawings, specifications, and relevant authority standards to ensure accurate survey execution and compliance with design requirements. Establish, verify, and maintain primary horizontal and vertical control points on site, including reference benchmarks and traverse networks. Coordinate with the Contractor’s surveyor to verify site benchmarks, layout, and control data prior to commencement of construction activities. Check and verify all setting-out works including alignment, levels, and coordinates for roads, utilities (wet and dry), structures, and other civil works to ensure accuracy and compliance with approved drawings. Monitor excavation levels, backfilling, and compaction layers to ensure compliance with approved design grades and tolerances. Inspect and confirm the correct installation of utilities, chambers, and ducts based on approved survey data and ensure correct cover levels and horizontal alignment. Conduct topographic and as-built surveys, ensuring data accuracy and proper submission of as-built drawings for approval. Verify survey instruments are properly calibrated and maintained as per project and QA/QC requirements. Assist the Resident Engineer (RE) and Assistant Resident Engineer (ARE) in checking the contractor’s survey works, identifying discrepancies, and issuing site instructions as required. Record and document survey data, prepare survey reports, and maintain field books for all inspection and verification activities. Ensure the contractor’s survey team follows approved method statements and safety procedures during survey activities. Perform joint surveys with the contractor and client representatives for measurement verification, payment quantities, and handover purposes. Ensure all utilities and structures are constructed to correct levels and alignments before covering or backfilling works. Participate in resolving survey-related issues or conflicts on site, including interface coordination between different packages or contractors. Report any discrepancies, deviations, or errors found in the contractor’s setting out to the RE/ARE immediately. Monitor Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) compliance during survey activities and report any unsafe practices observed on site. Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Surveying, Civil Engineering, or related discipline Minimum 7 years of experience in surveying and setting-out for infrastructure projects Proficiency in AutoCAD, Civil 3D, GPS, Total Station, and surveying software Strong understanding of coordinate systems, datum control, and vertical alignment verification Experience with deep pipeline, shaft construction, and tunnel alignment monitoring RTA approval and certification for Microtunneling Works (mandatory) Familiarity with RTA, DM, and DEWA standards for utility and infrastructure projects Expertise in stormwater drainage and microtunneling works Knowledge of UAE construction standards and procedures, particularly in Dubai Strong mathematical and problem-solving skills Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in all aspects of work Good physical fitness for fieldwork activities Valid driver's license Relevant university or college qualification (Min 3 Years of Diploma in Civil or Survey) RTA/ DM  Approval is preferred

jobs.title: Contracts Administrator - Rail
jobs.location: Abu Dhabi, UAE, United Arab Emirates
jobs.description: We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Contracts Administrator to support the commercial and contract management functions on major rail and infrastructure projects. The successful candidate will play a key role in ensuring effective contract administration, contractual compliance, and accurate documentation throughout the project lifecycle. This position requires strong knowledge of contract management principles, including experience administering contracts under FIDIC forms of contract, within large-scale design and construction environments. Key Requirements 5–10 years’ experience in contract administration within major rail and/or infrastructure projects Experience working on rail, metro, transportation, or other large-scale infrastructure developments is preferred Strong understanding of contract administration principles, commercial processes, and document control procedures Working knowledge and practical experience with FIDIC contracts   Experience supporting the management of variations, claims, contractual notices, and change control processes Strong organisational, analytical, and communication skills with excellent attention to detail Ability to coordinate effectively with multidisciplinary teams, consultants, contractors, and stakeholders Experience on complex, high-value infrastructure projects is highly desirable Middle East experience, particularly within the UAE, will be considered an advantage Key Responsibilities Support the administration and management of project contracts in accordance with contractual requirements and internal governance procedures Assist in the interpretation and application of FIDIC contract provisions and contractual obligations Maintain accurate and up-to-date contract records, correspondence, registers, and documentation Assist in the preparation, review, and processing of variations, claims, extension of time submissions, and contractual notices Monitor contractual deliverables, obligations, and key milestones to ensure compliance by all parties Coordinate with commercial, legal, engineering, and project delivery teams on contract-related matters Support the preparation of commercial reports, risk assessments, and contract status updates for management review Identify potential contractual risks and support mitigation strategies Ensure adherence to project procedures, contractual processes, and corporate governance requirements Support audits and ensure proper filing and traceability of contractual documentation throughout the project lifecycle Bachelor’s Degree in Quantity Surveying

jobs.title: Manager, Product Management Marketing Digital Innovation & Marketing AI Champion
jobs.description: Our Purpose Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential. Title and Summary Manager, Product Management Marketing Digital Innovation & Marketing AI Champion Overview As Marketing Services (MS), the marketing strategy & execution arm of Mastercard, we aim to focus on differentiated scalable and digital offerings that leverages our unique data and marketing technology to accelerate campaign performance and associated outcomes. Our vision is to become the partner of choice for Issuers and Merchants leveraging our data-driven marketing performance products to drive our client’s most profitable customer engagements and ultimately Mastercard preference with consumers. Through the transformation of the youngest and fastest growing MS region, EEMEA is seeking an experienced Marketing Services Product Manager. The candidates’ superior understanding of the card portfolio growth drivers and important KPIs to track blended with experience in targeted, data-driven marketing campaigns will deliver better results for clients and create their reliance on MS. We are seeking a high-caliber marketing professional with deep expertise in acquisition and engagement strategies, strong grounding in digital and data-driven marketing, and proven experience in driving innovation using AI and emerging technologies. This individual will play a pivotal role in elevating Mastercard’s value proposition across both traditional and non-traditional segments. Beyond financial institutions, the role will focus on unlocking new partnership opportunities with merchants, telcos, government entities, and broader ecosystem players. Role & Responsibilities - Champion a culture of innovation within MS by proactively identifying innovation opportunities, benchmarking global trends, and introducing new methodologies and tools that redefine how Mastercard and its clients approach customer acquisition and engagement. - Grow MS revenue by designing and implementing next-generation, AI-enabled marketing solutions that are scalable across issuers, merchants, telcos, governments, and emerging ecosystem partners. These solutions will integrate Mastercard’s data assets, advanced analytics, and marketing technology to deliver end-to-end acquisition, engagement, and portfolio growth programs that materially differentiate Mastercard in both traditional and new segments. - Leverage AI, machine learning, and emerging marketing technologies to design and deliver innovative acquisition and engagement campaigns, working closely with creative agencies, media partners, and technology vendors to develop breakthrough concepts, new use cases, and differentiated execution models that elevate marketing performance. - Translate new technology trends into actionable go-to-market strategies, ensuring that Mastercard remains ahead of competitors by operationalizing AI-driven campaign design, real-time optimization, and automated personalization at scale. - Identify and shape new scalable marketing plays for emerging segments (e.g., small merchants, large retailers, telcos, public-sector programs), adapting MS capabilities to fit their unique acquisition and engagement needs. - Lead experimentation frameworks and innovation sprints to test new channels, formats, value propositions, and AI tools that can unlock incremental growth for Mastercard clients across both carded and non-carded consumer segments. - Drive end-to-end digital marketing which includes analytical review of media strategies and plans, trouble shoot and work with partners to propose succ …

jobs.title: Procurement Professional
jobs.description: Are you passionate about Procurement? Do you enjoy building relationships and managing multiple priorities? Join our Procurement team and partner with the best To manage the buying process for a given set of goods to fulfil CWI supply chain orders. Apply sourcing policy, interface between supplier and entity with respect to specifications and budgets. Understands concepts, methods, procedures and approaches As a Procurement Specialist, you will be responsible for: Placing and following up on Pos. Managing relationships with suppliers for PO execution. Manage problems and schedule changes. Update ERP. Managing supplier relationships to understand the business, gather market intelligence, assess risk and ensure compliance to KPIs Elaborating proposals for improvement in approaches, methods, procedures and processes in the own field. Handling communication with direct colleagues and the business about design and coordination services rendered. Managing problems and scheduling changes Working closely with local manufacturing team, logistics teams and calibrate closely with HQ procurement team Aligning with global strategies Working closely with AP team for resolving payment issues. Working on special projects as assigned Fuel your passion To be successful in this role you will: Have bachelor's degree from an accredited university or college (or a high school diploma + 4 years of experience) Have 1+ years’ experience gained in the sourcing/ buying/ procurement role with an emphasis on MRP (Materials Requirements Planning) in Oil & Gas Industry. Have experience in heavy industries. Being proficient in MS Office, SAP and SAP Ariba Demonstrate excellent communication skills and an ability to build trusting relationships with internal customers and external suppliers Be based in UAE Be ok to work onsite Work in a way that works for you We recognize that everyone is different and that the way in which people want to work and deliver at their best is different for everyone too.: Working with us Our people are at the heart of what we do at Baker Hughes. We know we are better when all of our people are developed, engaged and able to bring their whole authentic selves to work. We invest in the health and well-being of our workforce, train and reward talent and develop leaders at all levels to bring out the best in each other. Working for you Our inventions have revolutionized energy for over a century. But to keep going forward tomorrow, we know we have to push the boundaries today. We prioritize rewarding those who embrace challenge with a package that reflects how much we value their input. The Baker Hughes internal title for this role is: Sourcing Professional - Buying/Procurement

jobs.title: Program Manager
jobs.description:
Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.

We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.

About the role

As a Program Manager within the Product organisation, you will be the bridge that brings colleagues together to deliver complex, cross-functional technical initiatives — often with tight deadlines and multi-layered dependencies. You will build relationships grounded in trust and integrity across the organisation and with third-party partners, enabling you to break through collaboration barriers, resolve conflicts, and manage risks effectively.

This role sits within the Rides Product team, which leads product strategy and delivery for the Rides vertical to simplify mobility for customers. You will play a critical role ensuring complex programmes land on time, to a high standard, and with full visibility across the organisation — including across third-party integration boundaries.

What you'll do

  • Work closely with engineers, product managers, designers, researchers, data analysts, commercial leaders, and operations teams to conceptualise cross-functional initiatives with layered dependencies and plan their execution
  • Organise and align multiple stakeholders — including third-party partners — to drive timely, accountable execution
  • Develop a solid understanding of the technical architecture to exercise sound judgment on risks, trade-offs, and cross-team dependencies
  • Drive progress transparency through structured communication of status, blockers, and upcoming milestones across all levels of the organisation
  • Lead incident coordination, post-mortems, and closure of action items to build systemic resilience over time
  • Own go-live orchestration for major launches — including rollout gates, rollback triggers, and cross-functional readiness sign-offs
  • Track and flag resourcing risks to support delivery pace and quality
  • Maintain the programme's source of truth: decision logs, dependency registers, and status documentation
  • Contribute to process improvement within the programme scope — identifying friction points and proposing better ways of working
  • Support and contribute to tools and dashboards that surface delivery health, pace, and quality for the Rides vertical
  • Embed AI tooling into core programme workflows — synthesizing meeting intelligence, surfacing dependency risks, and maintaining high-quality stakeholder comms at pace — and actively raise the team's capability to do the same

What you'll need

  • 5+ years of experience as a Program Manager in a fast-paced engineering organisation
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field
  • S …

jobs.title: Gas Turbine Inspector
jobs.description: Sulzer is a leading engineering company with a proud heritage of innovation. Join our global team to grow your expertise and develop innovative solutions that enable a prosperous and more sustainable society. About the role Purpose of the Job: Responsible for the inspection activities required in the SASOS workshop Main Duties involved but not limited to:  Bulk Strip and Detail Strip Inspection of Gas Turbines.  Provision of engine bulk strip and detailed defect reports.  Carry out stage inspections during engine build.  Controlling the workshop Control Order Files and support documentation.  Assisting the Company Quality Assurance representative in the absence of the supervisor.  Ensuring all measuring equipment in the workshop is approved calibrated and certified accordingly IAW the QMS manuals.  Development and revision of workshop procedures as and when required.  Sourcing suitable and effective alternatives to the OEM for required materials/repairs/overhauls.  Shipping and receipt of material to and from SASOS approved vendors.  Assist with in a timely manner the shipping and receipt of material to and from SASOS approved vendors. Progress and expedite all sub-con activity effectively.  Obtaining the most cost effective and minimum turn time for engine material requiring repair/overhaul/replacement.  Issuing of certificates of conformity for all materials being issued to and purchased by customers.  Assisting with shop floor fitting duties as designated by the Charge Hand or Operations Manager.  All other duties as relevant to the post and deemed reasonable by the Company. Education requirements (desirable):  Minimum NC Mechanical Engineering (or equivalent), preferably HNC Mech. Eng. Where formal qualifications are not held, suitable proven experience is essential. Job experience:  Previous experience in a similar role Knowledge requirements (professional, technical, language, safety):  Working knowledge of industrial gas turbines and/or power turbines and associated equipment  Ability to understand and communicate illustrated parts catalogues.  Ability to understand engineering drawings. What we offer you Sulzer is an equal opportunity employer. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and are committed to offering an inclusive work environment. We are proud to be recognized as a Top Employer 2026 in Brazil, Canada, China, Finland, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Switzerland, South Africa, the UK and the USA.

jobs.title: Gas Turbine Fitter
jobs.description: Sulzer is a leading engineering company with a proud heritage of innovation. Join our global team to grow your expertise and develop innovative solutions that enable a prosperous and more sustainable society. About the role Responsible for the repair and overhaul of industrial gas turbines, power turbines and associated accessories and equipment. Main Tasks: The duties involved include but are not limited to:  Maintaining standards of engineering, appearance, timekeeping, discipline and housekeeping.  The receipt, bulk strip, detail strip, sub assembly and final build of industrial gas turbines and power turbines.  Training of internal employees.  Adherence to and completion of all procedures and documentation controlling the overhaul process.  Accurate recording of all critical fits/clearances.  Highlighting and reporting of critical out-of-tolerance measurements and other non-conforming issues such as damaged or inadequately overhauled components.  Safe and correct use of all equipment and specialised tooling, including engine tooling is stored and maintained correctly and that any defective or missing equipment is reported immediately to supervising staff. Education requirements (desirable):  ITI, SVQ Graduate (or equivalent)., At least 6 years’ experience of overhauling and repairing gas turbines. Job experience:  Previous experience in a similar role would be advantageous. Knowledge requirements (professional, technical, language, safety):  Knowledge of gas turbine repair and refurbishment would be advantageous  Experience working as a senior workshop member in a fabrication, repair or construction environment. Competencies: Good written and verbal communication (English).  Good organisational skills.  Adaptable approach, able to work independently, and function effectively as part of a team.  Strong team player capable of working across various departments and with external stakeholders.  Attention to detail What we offer you TBD Sulzer is an equal opportunity employer. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and are committed to offering an inclusive work environment. We are proud to be recognized as a Top Employer 2026 in Brazil, Canada, China, Finland, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Switzerland, South Africa, the UK and the USA.

jobs.title: Gas Turbine Cleanline Operator
jobs.description: Sulzer is a leading engineering company with a proud heritage of innovation. Join our global team to grow your expertise and develop innovative solutions that enable a prosperous and more sustainable society. About the role Main Tasks and Responsibilities The duties involved include but are not limited to:  Cleaning of rotating equipment components not limited to aeroderivative gas turbines, pumps, compressors and steam turbines.  Processing of components in various chemical tanks.  Grit and vapour blasting of components.  Hand cleaning of various components.  Operation of ball burnishing machine.  Actively highlighting and assisting in improving quality standards within the department.  Ensure your own health and safety and that of others who may be affected by your acts or omissions  All other duties as relevant to the post and deemed reasonable by the Company. Quality, Health, Safety and Environment Sulzer ASOS is certified to ISO 9001 and 45001. The Company expects all employees to contribute to the effective implementation of its Integrated Management System. For this role, employees are expected to:  Comply with and adhere to the Company’s quality, health & safety and environmental policies and procedures.  Ensure your own health and safety and that of others who may be affected by your acts or omissions.  Proactively engage and support initiatives designed to promote a culture of safe working, quality, environmental protection and continual improvement.  Co-operate with the requirements of the Company’s QHSE Management System. No formal qualifications required with full training provided. However preference will be given to candidates with previous experience in a clean line/workshop environment. Competencies required: Ability to understand and interpret technical instructions  Flexible approach, team player and ability to work independently What we offer you Sulzer is an equal opportunity employer. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and are committed to offering an inclusive work environment. We are proud to be recognized as a Top Employer 2026 in Brazil, Canada, China, Finland, Germany, Ireland, Mexico, Switzerland, South Africa, the UK and the USA.

jobs.title: Resident Engineer
jobs.location: Abu Dhabi, UAE, United Arab Emirates
jobs.description: Leads the delivery (time, cost, quality) of assigned package. Supervise the contractors to ensure the works are constructed as per specification and to established milestone dates. Manage and direct the supervision team to undertake day to day inspections of the works. Maintain a very high level of Safety awareness and ensure the contractor complies with his obligations.  Capable of administering the FIDIC based contract or standalone Contracts Resolves site issues   Presents progress and package issues to client team.   Discuss changes to the scope of work with the Client and key subcontractors. Responsible for following up on instructions & commitments associated with the project Establishes Project Execution Plan, Health & Safety Plan, Quality Control Plan and other documents in relation to our scope Establishes the program requirements for all areas of the project and monitors site staff performance Plans, directs, supervises and controls the execution of all technical, fiscal and administrative functions of the project and the site team Assigns responsibility to key subordinates in their respective fields of expertise Provides input to performance reviews and develop plans for subordinates Work with other managers, project engineers and discipline Heads to develop budgets, schedules and plans for the various elements of the project Monitors and reports to management on the progress of all project activities within the program, including significant milestones and any conditions, which would affect project cost, schedule, performance or Client relation Establishes internal weekly meetings to review project status and formulate action items Performs other responsibilities associated with this position in line with AECOM policies and procedures Represent the company in Client meetings. Monitor Health and Safety of the construction works and lead to address violations Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or related field; Master's degree preferred Minimum of 20 years of experience in building engineering, with a focus on managing large-scale projects Proven track record in overseeing complex building projects in the Middle East In-depth knowledge of UAE construction standards, regulations, and best practices Strong understanding of building development, construction methodologies, and quality control processes Excellent project management skills, including budget and schedule management Advanced problem-solving and analytical abilities, with a keen eye for detail Outstanding leadership and team management skills Strong technical report writing and communication abilities Experience working in a fast-paced environment and managing multiple projects simultaneously Willingness to work on-site and travel as required for project needs Familiarity with local building codes and regulations in the UAE Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and implement innovative solutions

jobs.title: Project Controls Manager - Rail
jobs.location: Abu Dhabi, UAE, United Arab Emirates
jobs.description: Role Overview We are seeking an experienced Project Controls Manager to lead and oversee all project controls functions for a major rail infrastructure project. This role will be responsible for ensuring robust planning, scheduling, cost control, risk management, and performance reporting across the full project lifecycle. The successful candidate will bring extensive experience in the management of design and or construction phases of large scale rail projects, with a strong preference for High Speed Rail project exposure. Key Responsibilities • Lead the development and implementation of project controls frameworks, processes, and systems across the project • Oversee planning and scheduling activities, ensuring alignment with project milestones and delivery objectives • Manage cost control, budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting • Establish and monitor project KPIs, dashboards, and performance metrics • Lead risk management activities, including risk identification, analysis, mitigation, and reporting • Ensure effective change management and claims support in coordination with commercial teams • Provide strategic oversight on progress measurement and reporting to senior stakeholders • Coordinate with engineering, construction, and commercial teams to ensure integrated project delivery • Ensure compliance with client, regulatory, and governance requirements • Lead and mentor the project controls team Minimum Requirements • Minimum of fifteen (15) years of experience in project controls  • Proven experience in a Project Controls Manager or equivalent role on at least one project of similar size and complexity • Demonstrated experience of minimum 5 years in railway projects with High Speed Rail (HSR) projects being highly preferred   • Strong expertise in planning, cost management, risk management, and reporting • Proficiency in industry standard tools such as Primavera P6, cost management systems, and reporting platforms • Experience in the Middle East, particularly the UAE, is highly advantageous Key Competencies • Strong leadership and stakeholder management skills • Strategic thinking with strong analytical capability • Excellent communication and reporting skills • Ability to operate in a complex, multi stakeholder environment • High attention to detail with a proactive approach to problem solving • University degree in Engineering or a related discipline. A Master’s degree is preferred • Chartered Engineer status or equivalent professional accreditation is highly desirable

jobs.title: Land Surveyor
jobs.description: We are recruiting a detail‑oriented, analytical Land Surveyor to support freight facility projects across Fujairah and the wider UAE. You will ensure accuracy and precision across all surveying operations for freight facilities, collaborating with engineers, contractors, and operators to deliver safe, high‑quality outcomes in fast‑paced, live‑operations environments. If you thrive on precision and want to shape resilient, efficient freight infrastructure. Key Responsibilities Perform comprehensive survey work under the direction of senior surveying professionals, establishing primary horizontal and vertical control points with precision and accuracy Record all measurements, rod readings, and calculations meticulously in field books as work progresses, ensuring complete documentation and transparency Conduct pre-construction surveys to verify site conditions, identify potential obstructions, and support design verification processes Provide expert input and support for construction layout, staking, and setting out for roads, pavements, curbs, drainage systems, and utilities Monitor and verify contractor work alignment, levels, and grading against design drawings, maintaining rigorous quality standards Coordinate effectively with the contractor's surveyor and Resident Engineer on work priorities, measurements, and any discrepancies that arise Maintain survey equipment in optimal working condition and perform frequent calibration checks to ensure reliability and accuracy Utilize modern computer software, GPS technology, total stations, and advanced survey equipment for precise measurements and data collection Assist in preparing as-built drawings and maintain comprehensive documentation of survey records, reports, and maps for project reporting Check all work by completing traverse closures and bench circuits, demonstrating commitment to accuracy and professional excellence Ensure strict compliance with all safety procedures and protocols during survey operations, prioritizing the well-being of the team Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to resolve challenges and contribute innovative solutions to surveying obstacles What you will bring Proven land surveying experience on freight facilities. Proficiency with total stations, GNSS/GPS, digital/automatic levels, and common survey software; strong control and QA/verification skills. Familiarity with tolerances, drainage falls, slab flatness, and interface requirements typical of heavy‑use freight yards. Strong coordination and communication skills in fast‑paced, live‑operations settings. Commitment to safety, quality, and complete survey documentation. Bachelor's Degree or Diploma in Civil Engineering, Geodetic Engineering, or a related engineering field 7-10 years of professional experience as a Land Surveyor, with demonstrated expertise in construction and infrastructure projects Experience on freight facilities

jobs.title: Planning Engineer
jobs.description: Job Summary AECOM is seeking an experienced Planning Engineer for a major Roads and Bridges project located in Dubai. This position will be site based in charge of a package (project) responsible for providing planning and scheduling support and assistance to Project Managers and other Project team members. Key Responsibilities • Works with the company financial and cornerstone systems and processes.   • Applies financial terminology, measures, financial data analysis concepts and principles in assignments. • Recognizes processes/project actions that may lead to project financial impact. • Develops and maintains WBS for small projects.  • Assists in the use of drawings and specifications in the establishment of project baseline data.  • Begins basic analysis of cost and schedule variances. • Develops knowledge of accounting principles.    • Assists in assembling data for trending and forecasting. • Understands progress/performance data and associated concepts and principles. Participates in the collection of progress data and review of performance trends. • Familiar with earned value, scope control and change management concepts, principles and methodologies.  • Collects data and produces an initial analysis on manpower, labor hour, and labor cost requirements versus budget limitations.  • Collects and analyzes data for tracking actual cost to funding limitations.  • Provides support to tracking purchase order and subcontract commitments and expenditures. • Familiar with the concepts and principles of project revenue and cost. • Exposure to basic scheduling and cost baseline fundamentals, concepts and principles. • Introduced to performance management and cost/schedule integration concepts and principles. • Develops knowledge of scope control and change management. • Supports project reporting process as required.   • May participate in project cost review meetings. Minimum Qualification A Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or Construction Management. Experience Requirements Minimum of 10+ years’ experience in the Planning / Project Controls field is required. Applicants would ideally have worked on major programs in  transport. Advanced knowledge of ORACLE Primavera P6 Project Management Software. Ability to develop, monitor, and control schedules. Hands-on working knowledge of WBS coding structure, cost /schedule variance analysis, Earned Value Management (EVMS), project trend, contract change and claims. Working knowledge of Time Impact Analysis techniques.

jobs.title: Business Execution Support Analyst (UAE Nationals Only)
jobs.description: The Business Execution Analyst will be a pivotal member of the franchise's first line of defense, responsible for driving operational excellence, strengthening the control environment, and ensuring seamless coordination of key governance and regulatory processes. This role requires a proactive and detail-oriented individual who can effectively manage multiple priorities, liaise with various stakeholders, and provide critical support to the Business Execution team and senior leadership. The successful candidate will play a key role in upholding the integrity of the franchise's risk and control framework. Key Responsibilities: I. Governance & Committee Coordination Meeting Management: Drive the end-to-end preparation and coordination for Country Coordinating Committee (CCC) meetings. This includes compiling, reviewing, and distributing executive-level materials, preparing presentation slides, and collating essential data for discussion. Action Item Tracking: Diligently track, monitor, and follow up on all tasks and action items arising from CCC meetings to ensure timely completion and resolution by the responsible parties. Annual Survey Coordination: Lead the coordination and execution of the annual CCC survey, managing the process from distribution to data analysis and the presentation of findings. Documentation: Take ownership of maintaining and updating critical documents, records, and charters owned by the franchise. II. Issue & Risk Management Lifecycle Oversight: Manage downloading issue data from the management dashboard, tracking progress, and following up with relevant teams to ensure timely activation and closure. Responsibilities: Partner with Product Management in monitoring strategic marketing programs, strategic program roadmaps, program development, program/product launches, and program marketing to gain maximum benefit from each program/product and deliver on client value propositions Deploy profitable marketing strategies, implement key growth initiatives, and maintain current market intelligence on overall industry verticals and competitors Ensure successful execution against functional strategies for a business or product requiring coordination and integration across teams/business units, as well as execute marketing plan that spans product, brand, acquisition, customer, and retention to improve performance, brand preference, and client engagement Utilize specialty knowledge to review, analyze, and develop beyond existing solutions Contribute to day-to-day product marketing for core products including program delivery, client experience, and client communications strategy, as well as provide input into project plans and program affecting job family/function within a region/business Implement client value propositions, positioning, segmentation, pricing, targeting, channel strategies, and competitive differentiation to achieve preferred status as a partner to Citi clients Collect client and competitor market research, develop a product innovation roadmap and assist Marketing Product Managers in overseeing all aspects of program life cycle management including market demands, technology trends, and competitive field Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency. jobs.title: Business Planning Analyst (UAE Nationals Only)
jobs.description: Mehnaty Graduate Analyst is an Emirati Program for a duration of 12 months designed to develop and nurture UAE national talent, preparing fresh Emirati university graduates for future roles in banking. Are you ready to bring your knowledge from the classroom to the boardroom? Citi wants to help you get there! Whether it’s honing your skills or building your network, we know that success can’t come without growth. Our programs equip you with the knowledge and training you need to play a valuable role on your team and establish a long-term career here. At Citi, we value internal mobility, and career growth is not a question of “if”, but “when”. We want to hear from you if... Have already graduated between 2023 – 2025. Obtained or on course to achieve a 2:1 as per UK education system or GPA 3 or equivalent and above. Keen interest in a career in financial services. Key Responsibilities Data Collection & Analysis: Assist in gathering, organizing, and analyzing financial and operational data to identify trends, patterns, and insights. Reporting: Support the creation of regular reports, presentations, and dashboards to communicate business performance and planning outcomes to stakeholders. Forecasting & Modeling Support: Contribute to the development and maintenance of financial models and forecasts, providing input on assumptions and data validation. Strategic Initiatives: Assist in the planning and execution of various strategic projects and initiatives, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with various departments, including finance, operations, and sales, to gather information and ensure integrated planning. Documentation: Maintain accurate and up-to-date documentation of business processes, methodologies, and analytical findings. Ad-hoc Analysis: Perform ad-hoc analysis as required to support management decision-making. Who we think will be a great fit... We’re looking for motivated individuals, who are eager to start their careers at a global organization, tend to think globally, and have an innovative outlook on business. We know that anyone, not just those with business degrees can have a knack for business, so we’re open to all disciplines and candidates with diverse work experience. We value diversity and so do you. We’ll also be looking for the following: Excellent interpersonal skills to deal internally and externally with clients. Strong analytical and Presentation skills Desire to develop a deep understanding of the financial industry Intellectual curiosity and proactive approach to searching for new and creative ideas Articulate, strong communication, planning, and organisational skills You also have a strong desire to learn, are proactive, building rapport and relationships in team environments. Unquestioned commitment to integrity ethical decision-making We review applications on a rolling basis and therefore encourage you to apply as soon as possible. ------------------------------------------------------ Job Family Group: Management Development Programs ------------------------------------------------------ Job Family: Graduate ------------------------------------------------------ Time Type: Full time ------------------------------------------------------ Most Relevant Skills Please see the requirements listed above. ------------------------------------------------------ Other Relevant Skills For complementary skills, please see above and/or contact the recruiter. ------------------------------------------------------ Citi is an equal opportunity employer, and qualified candidates will receive consideration without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other characteristic protected by law. jobs.title: SVP – Wealth Business Risk and Controls – Business Regulatory Risk Management (UAE Nationals Only)
jobs.description: Individuals in Risk Assessment & Controls' design are responsible for developing, designing, and implementing controls programs, and providing review and guidance on robust controls design adhering to Citi’s Policies, Standards, and Frameworks. Individuals proactively identify and drive controls enhancements such as automation, standardization and rationalization including transformation execution activities. Includes first line activities for identification, measurement (significance and likelihood), and ongoing assessment of key risks and controls in partnership with relevant process owners to drive management decisions to operate within the firm’s Risk Appetite. Responsibilities: Regulatory Change Management: Actively collaborating with business to identify, evaluate, and manage regulatory adherence risks arising from the definition of business strategy, development of new products and services, changes in regulations or internal policies, or from business-led changes. Working with business, Legal & ICRM to facilitate regulatory change management activities by performing comprehensive impact assessments of regulatory changes on existing business processes, policies, procedures, systems, data requirements, and the overall control environment. Develop and implement structured project plans for the timely and effective integration of regulatory changes across relevant business units, ensuring clear ownership and accountability. Actively collaborate with business units to identify, evaluate, and manage regulatory adherence risks arising from new regulations or internal policy changes, documenting identified gaps and required actions. Facilitate communication and training programs on regulatory changes to ensure understanding and adherence by affected stakeholders across the organization. Track the implementation status of regulatory changes using established tools and methodologies, and report progress, challenges, and residual risks to senior management and governance committees. This includes maintaining an audit trail of decisions and actions taken. Regulatory Review & Exam Management : Serve as Controls point of contact for all regulatory examinations, audits, and inquiries from supervisory authorities, building strong working relationships. Coordinate and facilitate all aspects of regulatory reviews, including meticulous information gathering, comprehensive document production, scheduling and logistical management of meetings, and managing clear and consistent communications between regulators and internal stakeholders. Prepare and rigorously review responses to regulatory requests, ensuring accuracy, completeness, conciseness, and strict adherence to deadlines, often involving multiple internal stakeholders. Track, monitor, and report on all regulatory findings, recommendations, and the status of remediation efforts through their lifecycle. Participate in targeted reviews and engage proactively with Internal Audit and Compliance Assurance over potential regulatory findings, contributing to a unified front. Develop and implement strategies and playbooks to address recurring examination themes and enhance overall preparedness for future regulatory engagements, including mock exams and readiness assessments. Risk & Control Framework and Adherence: Collaborate with business units, Legal, and Independent Compliance Risk Management (ICRM) to continuously evaluate and drive the maintenance of the regulatory inventory linkage to supporting controls in Citi’s system of record. This ensures management can effectively demonstrate adherence to applicable laws and regulations through the Manager’s Control Assessment (MCA) program. Support the evaluation of Regulation Risk as part of Countries’ MCA Annual Risk Assessment process. Review Countries’ evaluation of Regulation Risk Control performance to identify and escalate high residual risks and those breaching defined risk appetite thresholds. Contribute towards a 1st line state of reg …

jobs.title: SVP – Wealth Business Risk and Controls – Governance, Escalation and Reporting (UAE Nationals Only)
jobs.description: Individuals in Risk Assessment & Controls design are responsible for developing, designing, and implementing controls programs, and providing review and guidance on robust controls design adhering to Citi’s Policies, Standards, and Frameworks. Responsibilities: Risk and Controls Governance: Lead the strategic development and continuous enhancement of governance deck content and format for various senior management forums specific to the wealth management business. Define the key messages, data points, and insights required to effectively communicate the state of the wealth control environment, emerging risks, and control performance. Coordinate and collaborate extensively with various stakeholders across the Wealth business, including first line of defense control officers, operational risk, compliance, legal, finance, and technology teams, to gather relevant data and updates Design and prepare visually compelling and executive-ready presentations that effectively convey complex risk and control information in a clear, concise, and impactful manner. Ensure all presentations adhere to established governance guidelines, branding standards, and regulatory expectations. Draft executive summaries, talking points, and accompanying documentation for presentations. Present governance decks to senior management forums and committees, articulating key findings, risks, control performance, and recommendations with confidence and clarity. Lead discussions, respond to challenging questions from senior leaders, and provide insightful perspectives on the wealth control landscape. Act as a subject matter expert during presentations, demonstrating a deep understanding of the wealth business and its control environment. Escalations and Reporting : Implement and maintain comprehensive escalation protocols for identifying, logging, assessing, reporting, and resolving risk events, control deficiencies, operational incidents, and compliance breaches within the wealth management business. Lead and facilitate structured "Lessons Learned" exercises, post-incident reviews, and post-mortem analyses for significant risk events, control breakdowns, audit findings, or operational incidents within wealth management. Provide periodic (e.g. weekly, monthly) updates and key risk indicators on control environment Ensure all material issues are promptly escalated to senior management, Second Line of Defense (SLOD) Risk and Compliance, Legal, and other relevant stakeholders. Drive root cause analysis for identified issues and oversee the development and implementation of effective corrective and preventative action plans. Monitor the progress of remediation efforts, ensuring timely completion and validation of issue closure. Facilitate clear and concise communication with all parties involved in an escalation, ensuring transparency and accountability. Act as Risk & Controls Team’s Record Management Officer, to ensure that control governance decks and other controls related documents are kept as per Citi’s Record Management standards. Manage Operations Loss, booking, tracking, linked attestations, and actions to be undertaken. Issue Management, Tracking and Reporting: Supports Issue and Corrective Action Plan (ICAP) lifecycle, partnering with Issue Management Controls Team, on logging, tracking, and managing all identified regulatory compliance issues, control deficiencies, and audit findings. jobs.title: Client Events and Campaigns Manager (UAE Nationals Only)
jobs.description: Role Overview We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and proactive Client Operations Specialist with at least 4-5 years of experience within the financial services industry. This role is critical in providing comprehensive support for our client relationship management and sales operations, focusing on the efficient execution of client-related processes across segments, data accuracy, campaign and Customer Value Proposition (CVP) and campaign management, event management, and expense processing. The ideal candidate will be adept at managing multiple tasks, possess strong organizational skills, and have a solid understanding of operational workflows within a fast-paced financial services environment. Key Responsibilities Campaign and Offer Fulfillment: Coordinate monthly offer and CVP fulfillment by obtaining relevant files, accurately identifying eligible clients, and performing stringent sample checks and controls to ensure precise delivery as per agreed frameworks Handle client enrollments for offers and CVP programs, ensuring a seamless experience. Manage gift and lifestyle programs offered to clients, including client eligibility identification, communication to RMs, consolidating responses, placing orders, and tracking order IDs. Client Segmentation and Event Management: Support client portfolio management by identifying executing Upgrade, downgrade, segment change processes as per agreed framework Collaborate with various stakeholders to facilitate any lifecycle management operational support Provide comprehensive operational support for client events, including logistics coordination, managing invitations and RSVPs, and ensuring smooth execution. Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to facilitate event success and client engagement. Account and Relationship Management Support: Assist in managing client complaints by following established procedures. Process client queries, requests and questions related to Citigold and Citigold Private Client segment propositions, campaigns and offers. Expense Management: Process and reconcile expenses related to client activities, campaigns, and events, ensuring adherence to internal policies and budget guidelines. Maintain accurate records for auditing purposes. Data Management and Reporting: Generate and maintain various performance trackers when required Manage primary and joint account holder segmentation. Required Qualifications Minimum graduate. Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Operations Management, or a related field. Minimum of 4-5 years of progressive experience in marketing operations, client services, or sales support within the financial services industry, with a strong focus on campaign fulfillment, event coordination, and expense management. Strong analytical skills with proficiency in data management and tracking tools (e.g., Excel, internal systems), including a strong understanding of MS Office. Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks effectively. Demonstrated ability to follow established processes and procedures accurately and consistently. Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, coupled with the confidence to interact professionally with RMs, team leads, seniors within the organization, and other internal stakeholders. Proactive and detail-oriented with a strong commitment to data accuracy and operational efficiency. Ability to understand key focus areas and work towards achieving them with minimal supervision. Preferred Qualifications Familiarity with CRM systems and financial services operational platforms. Experience with client lifecycle management processes (onboarding, upgrades, downgrades, offboarding). Understanding of regulatory requirements related to client data and financial operations. jobs.description: Are you looking for a career move that will put you at the heart of a global financial institution? Then bring your skills in expanding a high net worth client base. jobs.title: Account Executive - Portfolio - Public Sector - Abu Dhabi
jobs.description: Meet the Team : As an Account Executive for the UAE Public Sector, you will be the strategic leader driving Cisco's digital transformation initiatives across government entities and public institutions. You will own the entire sales cycle, from opportunity identification to deal closure, ensuring alignment with national digital agendas and Cisco's portfolio. Your role is pivotal in building trusted C-suite relationships and orchestrating cross-functional teams to deliver innovative, integrated solutions that address critical public service challenges. Key Responsibilities • Strategic Account Management: Develop and execute comprehensive account plans to meet and exceed sales targets, expanding Cisco's footprint within the UAE public sector. • Customer Engagement: Build and maintain strong C-level relationships, acting as a trusted advisor aligned with government digital transformation goals and regulatory requirements. • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Lead and coordinate internal teams (engineering, services, partners) to deliver end-to-end solutions tailored to public sector needs. • Contract Negotiation: Manage complex contract negotiations and oversee the full sales cycle to ensure seamless delivery and customer satisfaction. • Market Intelligence: Analyze market trends, policy changes, and procurement processes to proactively position Cisco as the preferred technology partner. • Partner Ecosystem Development: Collaborate with partners to build a robust ecosystem that supports government procurement and project execution. • Sales Tools Utilization: Leverage Cisco's technology stack and AI-driven sales tools to enhance sales efficiency and pipeline accuracy. Minimum Qualifications • Bachelor's degree in Business, Marketing, or a related Technical field. • Minimum 10 years of technology sales experience, with a focus on Public Sector or Government accounts in the UAE or Middle East. • Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding sales quotas in the region. • Fluency in English (written and verbal) and proficiency in Arabic. • Deep understanding of UAE public sector procurement, regulatory environments, and government digital transformation initiatives. Preferred Qualifications • Master's degree or MBA. • Experience selling cloud, security, and software-defined networking solutions. • Established network of relationships within UAE government and semi-government organizations. • Strong presentation and storytelling skills, capable of simplifying complex technical concepts for diverse stakeholders. • Ability to work effectively in a matrixed organization and lead through influence. Why Cisco? At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint. Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere. We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

jobs.title: Senior Draughtsman (BIM Coordinator)
jobs.description: Prepare and revise technical drawings, layouts, and as-built documentation using the latest versions of MicroStation and AutoCAD. Interpret design inputs from engineers and accurately translate them into detailed and coordinated construction drawings. Review, update, and maintain drawings in compliance with project specifications, authority requirements (RTA, DM, DEWA), and AECOM quality standards. Track and verify existing sewerage, stormwater, and irrigation networks in Dubai using as-built records from Drainage (DS), Irrigation (IRR), and Roads projects. Conduct site surveys and coordinate with inspectors to verify construction progress and collect accurate data for as-built documentation. Coordinate closely with engineers, inspectors, and document control teams to ensure timely submission and approval of drawings. Update and prepare redline markups, section details, pipeline profiles, and microtunneling shaft layouts based on field data. Maintain a well-organized archive and digital record system for all project drawings and revisions. Review contractors’ as-built and shop drawing submissions to verify compliance with actual site conditions. Provide technical drafting support during construction to ensure drawings reflect approved changes and actual site execution. Support the preparation of utility coordination drawings, ensuring accuracy across multiple services and avoiding conflicts. Ensure all drawing deliverables meet AECOM and authority CAD standards, including layering, scaling, and title block consistency. Bachelor's Degree in Geography, Civil & Survey Engineering, Geomatics Engineering or related curriculum (or equivalent) and typically 6+ years of related experience Minimum of 10 years of experience in BIM and GIS engineering roles. Proficiency in BIM Software: Mastery of BIM software platforms such as Autodesk Civil 3D, Autodesk MAP,  Bentley MicroStation, Infraworks,  is essential for creating and managing building models Strong command of GIS software such as Esri ArcGIS, QGIS,  Autodesk Autocad, Revit / Navisworks experience

jobs.title: Resident Engineer
jobs.description: The Resident Engineer will lead the supervision and management of the stormwater drainage components of a major infrastructure project in Dubai. The role is responsible for ensuring that all works are executed in full compliance with contract requirements, RTA/DM standards, approved drawings, and project specifications, while maintaining the highest standards of quality, safety, and performance. Key Responsibilities Lead the delivery of assigned project packages, ensuring adherence to schedule, budget, and quality targets. Supervise and manage contractors to ensure works are executed as per specifications, drawings, and project milestones. Direct, coordinate, and monitor the supervision team in conducting daily inspections of construction activities. Ensure full compliance with HSE requirements and promote a safety-first culture across all site operations. Resolve site-related issues promptly, providing sound engineering judgment and ensuring proper documentation. Represent AECOM in all Client, Contractor, and Authority meetings, maintaining professional communication and reporting standards. Review and endorse contractors’ technical submittals, method statements, material approvals, and construction drawings. Oversee and monitor progress reporting, schedule updates, and cost control to ensure alignment with project goals. Negotiate and manage scope variations, claims, and change requests in coordination with the Client and Contractor. Prepare and implement the Project Execution Plan, HSE Plan, and Quality Control Plan for the assigned package. Review and assess construction programs, technical deliverables, and cost estimates for accuracy and completeness. Mentor and supervise subordinate engineers and inspectors, conducting performance reviews and ensuring skill development. Conduct internal weekly meetings to monitor site performance and formulate corrective actions when necessary. Ensure adherence to all relevant RTA, DM, and local authority procedures and specifications related to microtunneling and drainage works. Perform other related duties as assigned to support the successful delivery of the project. Qualifications Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or related discipline (Master’s Degree preferred). Professional Engineering license or Chartership (e.g., CEng, PE) is an advantage. Comprehensive understanding of Dubai Authority procedures and approval processes (RTA, DM, DEWA, etc.). Experience Requirements Minimum  20 years of post-graduate experience  in the design and supervision of major infrastructure projects. Proven experience in  microtunneling works, stormwater drainage systems, deep shaft construction. Extensive  UAE experience —particularly within Dubai—is essential, including a strong track record with  RTA and Dubai Municipality  infrastructure projects. Experience managing  multi-disciplinary teams , overseeing contractors, and coordinating with multiple stakeholders and authorities.     Bachelor Degree in relevant Engineering field (i.e. Civil, etc.) Engineering charter ship will be advantageous. Dubai Authorities’ understanding will be advantageous. Dubai Municiplaity STP project, water treatment plant project experience is ideal for this role. Experience Minimum of 20 years’ post-graduate experience in the design and site supervision of projects, with a broad general engineering background. UAE experience is essential, particularly within Dubai, including proven expertise in existing sewerage treatment works in the Emirate of Dubai, as well as the design and construction of sewage treatment plants within the region.

jobs.title: Senior Engineer - Structural
jobs.location: Abu Dhabi, UAE, United Arab Emirates

Interprets or clarifies contract documents for Contractors. jobs.title: Senior BIM Engineer - Site
jobs.location: Abu Dhabi, UAE, United Arab Emirates
jobs.description: The Senior BIM Engineer – Supervision is responsible for overseeing the implementation and management of Building Information Modelling (BIM) processes on the projects. This role ensures the delivery of high-quality digital outputs, alignment with project requirements. The position requires strong coordination, technical expertise, and stakeholder engagement to drive digital excellence throughout the project lifecycle.  Job Duties: Develop, implement, and enforce BIM standards, workflows, and execution plans in the projects. Ensure all BIM models and shop drawings comply with company, client, and project-specific requirements. Lead the integration of BIM processes into project delivery, ensuring alignment with digital engineering strategies. Act as the primary point of contact for BIM-related coordination among architects, engineers, contractors, and other stakeholders. Facilitate cross-disciplinary collaboration to resolve BIM-related issues and ensure seamless model integration. Support project teams in effectively interpreting and applying BIM standards. Oversee the creation, maintenance, and updating of BIM models and associated digital deliverables. Conduct regular quality control checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and compliance with specifications. Implement procedures for model audits, clash detection, and data validation to ensure accuracy and integrity. Provide guidance, training, and technical support to project teams on BIM tools, workflows, and best practices. Manage BIM software tools, including installation, configuration, licensing, and troubleshooting. Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend the adoption of innovative digital solutions to enhance project delivery. Stay current with industry trends, standards, and advancements in digital engineering. Develop and manage BIM execution plans tailored to each project's specific needs. Monitor progress against BIM deliverables to ensure timely and budget-compliant outcomes. Support project reporting and documentation related to digital engineering activities. Strong understanding of construction processes, digital workflows, and data management. Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field. Extensive experience with BIM software such as Revit, AutoCAD, and Navisworks. Strong understanding of construction processes and shop drawing requirements. Strong experience in ISO 19650 Strong working experience in BIM methodologies Strong experience in AutoCAD Civil 3D Excellent communication and coordination skills. Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines. Minimum of 15 years of experience.

jobs.title: Resident Engineer - Freight Facilities
jobs.description: AECOM is seeking an experienced Resident Engineer for a major Freight Facilities Project located in Northern Emirates. The Resident Engineer will be responsible for leading and managing the site supervision team and ensuring that all construction activities are executed in accordance with the contract requirements, project specifications, approved drawings, quality standards, safety requirements, and project schedule. The successful candidate will oversee the delivery of infrastructure and freight facility works, coordinate with stakeholders and authorities, manage contractor performance, and ensure compliance with project objectives and international best practices. Job Duties Lead and manage the site supervision team for the Freight Facilities Project in Northern Emirates. Monitor the Contractor’s work progress against the approved construction programme and identify potential delays or risks. Ensure compliance with Contract Documents, specifications, approved drawings, and project procedures. Supervise construction activities related to freight facilities, roads, utilities, logistics yards, service corridors, drainage, and associated infrastructure works. Review and approve method statements, shop drawings, material submittals, RFIs, and technical submissions. Coordinate with Clients, Authorities, Contractors, Stakeholders, and other consultants to ensure smooth project execution. Monitor site safety implementation and ensure compliance with project SH&E requirements and safety regulations. Conduct regular site inspections and audits to verify quality of workmanship and materials. Review and certify contractor interim payment applications. Evaluate and prepare Variation Orders, Change Orders, Claims, and Extension of Time recommendations in accordance with the Contract. Monitor testing and commissioning activities and ensure compliance with project specifications. Maintain proper documentation and records related to progress, quality, safety, inspections, and contractual matters. Prepare and review weekly and monthly progress reports. Support project close-out activities, including snagging, testing & commissioning, as-built drawings, and handover documentation. Ensure effective coordination between all engineering disciplines and stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle. Mentor and guide junior engineers and inspectors within the supervision team.       Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from an accredited university. Chartered Engineer status or equivalent professional accreditation is preferred.   Specific Skills Required Strong experience in construction supervision of freight facilities, logistics hubs, industrial infrastructure, roads, utilities, and heavy civil works. Excellent understanding of FIDIC Contracts, particularly Red Book conditions. Strong knowledge of project planning, construction methodologies, contract administration, and claim management. Experience in coordinating with local authorities and stakeholders in UAE. Ability to manage multidisciplinary supervision teams on large-scale infrastructure projects. Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills. Proficient in modern construction management software and reporting systems. Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.   Experience Minimum 20 years of overall experience in construction supervision and infrastructure projects. Minimum 10 years of experience as Resident Engineer on large-scale infrastructure or industrial developments. Previous experience in freight facilities, logistics infrastructure, industrial zones, ports, or major transportation projects is highly preferred. GCC/UAE experience is mandatory, preferably within Northern Emirates region projects.

jobs.title: Inspector - Architectural

jobs.description: Monitoring and ensuring that all architectural engineering aspects of the project are carried out as per inspection plan/drawings/codes and specifications.
